zh.lifeSummary: 當Joyce Barrett於1520年出生在英國英格蘭艾可奧瑟特時，她的父親John Barrett66歲，母親Philippa Harpsfield49歲。她於大約1539年與Sir James Wilford在英國結婚。她去世於1580年9月15日在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joyce Barrett于1520年出生在英国英格兰艾可奧瑟特时，她的父亲John Barrett66岁，母亲Philippa Harpsfield49岁。她于大约1539年与Sir James Wilford在英国结婚。她去世于1580年9月15日在英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Barrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Barret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Baratta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Pasquale, Alfonse, Antonio, Carmela, Guido, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian: occupational name for a market trader, especially in northern Italy, from baratta ‘exchange, sale, buying and selling’, a derivative of barattare ‘to barter’. See also Barrett .

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

en.lifeSummary: When Joyce Barrett was born in 1520, in Orsett, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Barrett, was 66 and her mother, Philippa Harpsfield, was 49. She married Sir James Wilford about 1539, in England. She died on 15 September 1580, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joyce Barrett est née en 1520, à Orsett, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Barrett, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Philippa Harpsfield, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Wilford environ 1539, à Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 15 septembre 1580, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joyce Barrett 1520 in Orsett, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Barrett 66 und ihre Mutter Philippa Harpsfield 49. Sie hat um 1539 in England Sir James Wilford geheiratet. Sie starb am 15. September 1580 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce Barrett è nata il nel 1520 nel Orsett, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Barrett, aveva 66 anni e sua madre, Philippa Harpsfield, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Wilford circa 1539, nel England. Morì il 15 settembre 1580, nel Cranbrook, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joyce Barrettが1520年にイギリスイギリスエセックスオルセットで生まれた時，父John Barrettは66歳，母Philippa Harpsfieldは49歳であった。約1539年にイギリスでSir James Wilfordと結婚した。彼女は1580年9月15日にイギリスイギリスケントクランブルークで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joyce Barrett(이)가 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 오세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Barrett(은)는 66세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Harpsfield(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 대략 1539년 영국에서 Sir James Wilford(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1580년 9월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce Barrett nasceu em 1520, em Orsett, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Barrett, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Harpsfield, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Wilford aproximadamente 1539, em Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1580, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joyce Barrett родилась в 1520 г. в местности орсетт, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Barrett было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Harpsfield, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Wilford около 1539 г. в местности Англия. Она умерла 15 сентября 1580 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joyce Barrett nació en 1520, en Orsett, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Barrett, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Philippa Harpsfield, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Sir James Wilford aproximadamente 1539, en Inglaterra. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1580, en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
